caption: A man wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a bow tie, glasses, and large over-ear headphones speaks into a professional microphone in a room decorated with numerous framed photos on the wall. He has light-colored, spiky hair styled upwards. In each frame, he is positioned behind a desk with his arm resting on the surface, subtly shifting his head and facial expression as he talks. To his left, a logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is visible. Another similar logo with the text "BOSS TALK 101" appears further to the right. The background contains a clothing rack with items labeled "LEE" and several small framed portraits. The scene remains consistent across the frames, capturing the man in a mid-shot as he engages in a conversation during a podcast recording.
